summary: Timeline Intelligence Engine testing completed successfully. All 32 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified - TimelineIntelligencePanel renders on project details page with all calculation factors, milestones, and override functionality. TimelineApprovalsPanel displays correctly on Design Manager Dashboard.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/timeline-config/options returns 200 with scope_types, project_tiers, priority_tags, skill_levels
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/timeline returns 200 with exists, timeline, active_milestones, pending_approval, is_shared_with_customer
Backend: Timeline has 11 milestones with correct structure (milestone_key, milestone_name, planned_date, is_customer_facing)
Backend: GET /api/timelines/pending-approvals returns 200 with pending_count and timelines array
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/timeline/history returns 200 with timeline versions and approval_history
Backend: GET /api/projects/{id}/timeline/customer-view filters out internal milestones (is_customer_facing=false)
Backend: Sequential override control - rejects second override while one is pending (400 error)
Backend: PUT /api/projects/{id}/timeline/review endpoint exists and works
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/timeline/share endpoint exists and works
Backend: Users list API now includes skill_level field for designers
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/timeline/generate returns 400 if timeline already exists
Backend: Timeline calculation_inputs include all 7 factors (scope, tier, priority, skill, workload, manager buffer, client buffer)
Backend: Timeline has at least 2 internal milestones (Internal Design Review 1 & 2)
Backend: 404 returned for invalid project timeline requests
Backend: Full timeline workflow test passed (get -> check pending -> review)
Frontend: Login with founder credentials successful
Frontend: Project Details page loads correctly
Frontend: TimelineIntelligencePanel renders on project details page
Frontend: Project Timeline section shows scope (3 BHK), tier (Premium), priority (VIP) badges
Frontend: View Calculation Factors button opens modal with all calculation inputs
Frontend: Calculation modal shows Combined Design Multiplier (×1.656)
Frontend: Milestones displayed with dates (Site Measurement, Design Meeting 1, etc.)
Frontend: Request Override button visible for authorized users
Frontend: Shared badge indicates timeline shared with customer
Frontend: Design Manager Dashboard loads correctly
Frontend: Timeline Approvals panel visible on Design Manager Dashboard
Frontend: Timeline Approvals shows 'No pending timeline approvals' when queue is empty
Frontend: Refresh button available on Timeline Approvals panel
critical_code_review_comments: Backend timeline_engine.py: Well-structured timeline generation with 7 calculation factors
Backend server.py (lines 15444-16173): Complete Timeline Intelligence API implementation
Backend: Sequential override control properly prevents multiple pending overrides
Backend: Customer view correctly filters internal milestones (is_customer_facing=false)
Backend: Approval workflow with version tracking and history logging
Frontend TimelineIntelligencePanel.jsx: Comprehensive UI with milestones, calculation factors modal, override request
Frontend TimelineApprovalsPanel.jsx: Manager approval workflow with review modal
Fixed: Added skill_level to format_user_response() function for users list API
seed_data_creation: Used existing test project proj_8aeea5f1 with timeline already generated and shared with customer
context_for_next_testing_agent: Timeline Intelligence Engine is fully functional. Backend APIs tested via pytest (32 tests passed). Frontend UI tested via Playwright. Test project proj_8aeea5f1 has a timeline with: scope=3bhk, tier=premium, priority=vip, 11 milestones, v1 approved and shared with customer. The TimelineIntelligencePanel is integrated in ProjectDetails.jsx (line 1100). The TimelineApprovalsPanel is integrated in DesignManagerDashboard.jsx (line 169). All 7 calculation factors are working: scope complexity, designer skill, workload, project tier, priority, manager capacity, client buffer.

timeline_config_options_api.returns: scope_types, project_tiers, priority_tags, skill_levels with labels and multipliers

timeline_generation_api.creates: Timeline with 11 milestones based on 7 calculation factors

timeline_override_api.creates: New version pending approval, enforces sequential control

timeline_review_api.actions: Approve or reject pending timeline version

timeline_share_api.marks: Timeline as shared with customer (requires approved version)

customer_view_api.filters: Internal milestones (Internal Design Review 1 & 2) from customer view

pending_approvals_api.returns: List of timelines needing manager approval

frontend_timeline_panel.features: Milestones display, calculation factors modal, override request, share button

frontend_approvals_panel.features: Pending approvals list, review modal, approve/reject actions
